description: RepSaga RPG cross-build distinction titles (7 entries: 5 v1 strength + 2 Phase 38f cardio cross-build). Spec §10.3. Slugs are stable join keys — `earned_titles.title_id` references this list. Display copy lives in `lib/l10n/app_en.arb` + `app_pt.arb` keyed by `title_{slug}_name` and `title_{slug}_flavor`. The `trigger_id` enum bridges the catalog to the Dart predicate in `lib/features/rpg/domain/cross_build_title_evaluator.dart` — the structural AND/OR/threshold logic cannot be expressed in JSON cleanly, so the catalog stores the trigger token and the predicate body lives in version-controlled Dart.
